title: [YTP] Konata receives a call from a parallel dimension
description:
The Lucky Star English Trailer was released recently:
http://uk.youtube.com/watch?v=kKtNTbFTtgM

In my opinion, it's pretty good, except that they need to work on Kagami a bit.

Also, I made this YouTube Poop from it.  Please forgive me for picking on Miyuki.
